not_available_content: I'm working on it, but it's a slow process. Reach out via Github for early access if you like sharp edges.
home_intro: Welcome to DiceThing. Write your intro copy here.
error_404_message: We couldn't find the page you were looking for. It may have rolled off the table.
error_generic_message: An unexpected error occurred. Try again, or head back home.
start_no_saved_sets: You don't have any saved sets... yet ;)
delete_set_warning: This will permanently delete "{name}". This cannot be undone.
preset_options_set_name_placeholder: Enter a name for your set

match.preset=go_first: A set of 4d12 that always roll different numbers and have a equal chance of each die being first (and second, third, fourth).
match.preset=scratch: Empty set so you can start from a blank slate
match.preset=classic: The standard 7 D&D dice set with a caltrop D4. Sized around a 14mm D6
match.preset=dicething: A larger than standard set with the shapes that I like (no caltrops!)
match.preset=chris: Chris' own custom layout based on the DiceThing 7 sizes
match.preset=everything: One of every dice shape in this app
match.preset=mine: Chris' own custom set with 2 D6 and 2 D20

match.id=crystal_height: Length of the long edge of the body
match.id=crystal_width: Length of the short edge of the body
match.id=crystal_cap: Height of the caps above the long edges of the body
match.id=crystal_twist: Rotation of the the cap with respect to the other faces
match.id=prism_length: Length of the prism along its long axis
match.id=prism_width: Width of each long (blank) side face
match.id=prism_cap: Height of the numbered facets at each end
match.id=prism_twist: Twist of the ends relative to the body. Skews the long faces into hexagons
match.id=handedness: Mirror form of the die: 0 is left-handed, 1 is right-handed
match.id=trunc_oct_truncation: How far each corner of the octahedron is cut back, in mm. 0 is a sharp octahedron; higher grows the square faces
match.id=shard_height: Length of the long edge of the body
match.id=shard_cap: Height of the caps above the long edges of the body
match.id=shard_twist: Rotation of the cap with respect to the other faces. 0 is none, 0.5 is exactly half way
match.id=trapezohedron_radius: Distance from the center axis to the edge vertices
match.id=coin_shape_mode: Use a regular polygon, or a custom SVG path, for the two faces
match.id=coin_path: An SVG path (the 'd' attribute) used for the two faces. Centered and resized to the diameter
match.id=coin_thickness: Thickness of the coin (distance between the two faces)
match.id=coin_segments: Number of segments around the rim. Higher looks rounder
match.id=infinity_width: Width of the square cross-section (also the diameter of the rounded ends)
match.id=infinity_length: Length of the straight body between the two rounded ends
match.id=barrel_height: Length of the barrel body between the two end caps
match.id=barrel_radius: Distance from the central axis to the ring corners
match.id=barrel_cap: Height of the pointed pyramidal end caps
match.id=barrel_twist: Twist of the end caps, faceting them and the number faces into a crystal point. 0 leaves plain pyramidal caps
match.id=coin_bevel_angle: Slope of the bevelled edge from vertical. 0° is a flat edge, 45° is the deepest chamfer
match.id=coin_bevel_amount: How much of the edge is bevelled. 0% is a flat edge, 100% comes to a point
match.id=trunc_tetra_size: Edge length of the underlying tetrahedron
match.id=trunc_tetra_truncation: How far each corner is cut back. Higher gives larger number triangles
match.id=skew: How far the faces are skewed. The faces stay congruent, so the die remains fair; higher is more distorted
match.id=engraving_tolerance: Minimum distance a legend must be inset from the edge of a face

format_painter_toast: Format Painter: face configuration from current face will be copied to clicked faces
face_parameters_rotation_description: Angle of rotation of the legend
face_parameters_offset_x_description: Horizontal offset of legend from center
face_parameters_offset_y_description: Vertical offset of legend from center
preferences_developer_mode_hint: Enables wireframe rendering, an FPS/stats counter, and raw/JSON parameter editors.
export_approx_volume_hint: Approximate. Dice volumes exclude legend engraving.
export_nothing_selected: Select at least one die to export.

match.kind=d4_crystal: The caps are tall enough that this crystal can come to rest on a blank cap, leaving no number up. Lower the cap height or increase the twist to fix it.
match.kind=d6_crystal: The caps are tall enough that this crystal can come to rest on a blank cap, leaving no number up. Lower the cap height or increase the twist to fix it.
match.kind=d8_crystal: The caps are tall enough that this crystal can come to rest on a blank cap, leaving no number up. Lower the cap height or increase the twist to fix it.
match.kind=d10_crystal: The caps are tall enough that this crystal can come to rest on a blank cap, leaving no number up. Lower the cap height or increase the twist to fix it.
match.kind=d00_crystal: The caps are tall enough that this crystal can come to rest on a blank cap, leaving no number up. Lower the cap height or increase the twist to fix it.
match.kind=d12_crystal: The caps are tall enough that this crystal can come to rest on a blank cap, leaving no number up. Lower the cap height or increase the twist to fix it.
match.kind=d3_odd_prism: The numbered ends are tall enough that this prism can come to rest on an end instead of a blank side, giving no clear result. Lower the end height to fix it.
match.kind=d5_odd_prism: The numbered ends are tall enough that this prism can come to rest on an end instead of a blank side, giving no clear result. Lower the end height to fix it.
match.kind=d7_odd_prism: The numbered ends are tall enough that this prism can come to rest on an end instead of a blank side, giving no clear result. Lower the end height to fix it.
match.kind=d4_truncated_tetrahedron: This d4 can settle on a number triangle as well as on a blank face — that's expected for a truncated d4. A deeper truncation rolls better but lands on a number triangle more often; reduce the truncation to favour a clear blank-down result.
match.kind=d8_truncated_octahedron: This d8 can settle on a blank square as well as on a numbered face — that's expected for a truncated d8. More truncation rolls better but lands on a blank square more often; reduce the truncation to make that rarer.
match.kind=*: This die can come to rest on a face that leaves no clear result.

engraving_excluded_hint: Excluded by default because its engraving is broken.
mesh_check_hint: Some dice may not slice or print cleanly. This usually comes from an engraving.
export_opt_blanks_bigger_help: Smaller blanks are the normal ones. Bigger blanks are for making smooth (un-engraved) dice.
export_opt_blanks_tolerance_help: Blank is inset by the max engraving depth of the die plus this tolerance.
export_opt_blanks_outset_help: Blank is the die size outset (grown) by this amount.
export_opt_platforms_description: A short drafted pedestal matching the die face, to print the die on.
export_opt_platforms_inset_help: How far the top surface is pulled in from the die face edge. The top is the important surface.
export_opt_platforms_outset_help: How far the base is pushed out past the die face edge, for a stable, drafted pedestal.
legends_editor_check_broken: These glyphs may not print cleanly:
legends_editor_check_info: Fonts and SVGs aren't built for 3D printing - their outlines can self-intersect, leave tiny gaps, or fold back on themselves. When carved into a die these flaws become holes, non-manifold edges or zero-area triangles that stop a slicer from producing a printable model. This check engraves each character (and any imported SVG/path) onto a test die and verifies the result is watertight, manifold and clean, so you can catch a problem glyph here instead of at the printer.
legends_no_custom: You haven't created any legend sets yet.
legends_create_chars_help: Space-separated list of characters. Their order sets the legend slot layout used for dice numbering (slot 31 is reserved for the maker logo).
legends_delete_warning: This will permanently delete "{name}". This cannot be undone.
legends_delete_in_use: "{name}" is used by {count} dice set(s), so it can't be deleted.
legends_editor_not_found: That legend set could not be found.
legends_editor_no_font: No source font (you can't add new glyphs)
legends_editor_select_hint: Select a legend to preview it. Detailed per-legend editing is coming soon.
legends_editor_svg_stroke_only: This SVG uses stroked outlines, so there are no filled shapes to use as an outline. Please use the Complex Import
legends_editor_svg_empty: No filled shapes were found in that SVG.
legends_editor_svg_unsupported: This SVG contains elements we can't import ({elements}). In your vector editor convert them to paths (e.g. Inkscape: select them, then Path > Object to Path), re-export and import again.
legends_editor_svg_complex_hint_none: Use the Complex Import to attempt to import this SVG correctly.
legends_editor_svg_complex_hint_some: If the preview doesn't look right, you can use the complex import to attempt to fix the import.
legends_editor_svg_trace_outline_help: Stroke the path's edges; a closed stroke becomes a hollow outline.
legends_editor_svg_use_path_help: Use the path exactly as drawn, keeping any holes.
legends_editor_svg_fill_path_help: Fill the path solid, removing any holes.
boxes_pick_set_header: Choose a set to build a box for
boxes_no_sets: You don't have any saved sets yet. Create a dice set first.
boxes_layout_hint: Drag dice to position them, drag the round handle to rotate. Drag the box edges or corners to resize - they stop at the dice.
boxes_layout_empty: No dice are included in the box.
boxes_dice_summary: {included} of {total} dice included. Toggle and arrange them in the layout editor.
boxes_chamfer_hint: Truncates the corners into an octagon, leaving room for the magnets.
boxes_bevel_hint: Truncates the bottom outer edge of the base and lid inward (a 45° chamfer) for the EDDC profile.
boxes_tray_depth_hint: Sinks the interior slightly below the seam, leaving a flat rim (corners stay solid for magnets).
boxes_cavity_depth_hint: How deep each die sinks in (lower leaves it proud, easier to grab).
boxes_rows_hint: Split the dice across this many rows (each centred). 1 row makes a long thin box.
boxes_double_sided_hint: Split the dice across the base and lid for slimmer double-sided storage.
boxes_magnets_hint: The clamshell is held shut by magnets in the truncated corners.
boxes_hinge_hint: A hinge on the back edge (geometry coming later). Set the magnet count above to suit.
boxes_seam_hint: Base and lid are equal height; every die straddles the seam.
